sentences.arabic: تُعَدُّ الضِّيافَةُ فِي الثَّقافَةِ العَرَبِيَّةِ رُكْنًا أَساسِيًّا يَتَجاوَزُ مَفْهُومَ تَقْدِيمِ القُوتِ لِيُصْبِحَ رَمْزًا لِلْكَرَمِ وَالنُّبْلِ.
sentences.translation: Gostoprimstvo se u arapskoj kulturi smatra osnovnim stubom koji prevazilazi koncept posluživanja hrane kako bi postalo simbolom darežljivosti i plemenitosti.
sentences.translationEn: Hospitality in Arab culture is considered a fundamental pillar that goes beyond the concept of providing sustenance to become a symbol of generosity and nobility.

sentences.arabic: فَمُنْذُ القِدَمِ، اعْتُبِرَ إِكْرامُ الضَّيْفِ واجِبًا أَخْلاقِيًّا يُلْزِمُ المُضِيفَ بِتَحْضِيرِ أَجْوَدِ ما لَدَيْهِ مِنَ الذَّبائِحِ وَالأَصْنافِ التَّقْلِيدِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Od davnina se ugošćavanje gosta smatralo moralnom obavezom koja obavezuje domaćina da pripremi ono najbolje što ima od mesa i tradicionalnih jela.
sentences.translationEn: Since ancient times, honoring a guest has been considered a moral duty that obligates the host to prepare the finest meats and traditional dishes available to them.

sentences.arabic: وَغالِبًا ما تَتَصَدَّرُ مائِدَةَ الوَلائِمِ أَطْباقٌ غَنِيَّةٌ مِثْلُ "المَنْسَفِ"، حَيْثُ يُطْهَى اللَّحْمُ بِعِنايَةٍ فائِقَةٍ مَعَ الأَرُزِّ المَنْقُوعِ بِالسَّمْنِ البَلَدِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Često trpezama na gozbama dominiraju bogata jela poput "mansafa", gdje se meso kuha s izuzetnom pažnjom uz rižu natopljenu domaćim maslom.
sentences.translationEn: Rich dishes such as 'Mansaf' often take center stage at banquet tables, where meat is cooked with extreme care alongside rice soaked in traditional clarified butter.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الِاجْتِماعَ حَوْلَ طَبَقٍ واحِدٍ كَبِيرٍ يُعَزِّزُ رَوابِطَ الأُلْفَةِ وَيَمْحُو الفَوارِقَ الِاجْتِماعِيَّةَ بَيْنَ الحاضِرِينَ بِمُخْتَلِفِ مَراتِبِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Okupljanje oko jednog velikog pladnja jača veze bliskosti i briše društvene razlike među prisutnima, bez obzira na njihove statuse.
sentences.translationEn: Gathering around a single large platter strengthens the bonds of intimacy and erases social differences among those present, regardless of their ranks.

sentences.arabic: وَبِناءً عَلَى ذلِكَ، يَظَلُّ الطَّعامُ فِي مَنْظُورِ الشُّعُوبِ العَرَبِيَّةِ جِسْرًا لِلتَّواصُلِ الإِنْسانِيِّ وَتَعْبِيرًا عَنْ مَوَدَّةٍ تَتَوارَثُها الأَجْيالُ عَبْرَ العُصُورِ.
sentences.translation: Na osnovu toga, hrana u perspektivi arapskih naroda ostaje most za ljudsku komunikaciju i izraz naklonosti koju generacije nasljeđuju kroz vijekove.
sentences.translationEn: Accordingly, food remains, in the perspective of Arab peoples, a bridge for human communication and an expression of affection inherited by generations through the ages.
